speaker: MATT
raw_text: I understand that, but not every transformation is impervious to scrutiny. "Wait... shit, we've been infiltrated!" He pulls his other blade out, the guy behind him goes ahead and pulls out his blade as well. Roll initiative. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, that's a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hide, just in case they come this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As Nott darts around the corner, you suddenly hit what feels like a wall at first. But it's softer and covered in material. You look up to see one of the hooded lackeys of the Iron Shepherds who had just come around the other side. Goes, "What the fuck?" and pulls out his short sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I grab Nott by the scruff and lift him away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her you mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Her, oh thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Clay, I am a woman, I know you're new here. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's a whole conversation there that I'm excited to have when we're not having, okay-- We need one for questioning man. We caught one of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let me go! I didn't do nothing wrong.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nope, no, we got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I say shut up you miscreant and I backhand Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (cries out)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. I'll say make a deception check Caduceus, with advantage because you've been given help from your friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: My deception-- That's 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's going to roll. He's going to do something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They both stop and glance and look at this, and the one that Nott had bumped into leans forward-- you can see his squared, scarred chin where none of his facial hair grows from some sort of deep wound he had received at a younger age. You see his eyes, these deep, sunken brown irises staring back, as he goes "I don't think I've ever seen you around here before."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have his face though. I have the face of the one-- I'm not wearing a costume, am I?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: "I have his face though."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean I look like one of the guards.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he had the disguise spell.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At this point, Keg, you've just come down the stairs. Roll initiative for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As he backs up, I'm going to take his head and slam it back into the wall he just ran into.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Attack rolls have have advantage now because he is stunned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good, because that was a natural one. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're a beast!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's still standing, but he's looking pretty beat up and he's just making vowel sounds now. Speech isn't capable given the series of events that have transpired.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to say  Shut up! And crack him across the face again with my bonus, my off-handed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was a Gil, but he did good. 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits, roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nine damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're like, "Shh!" (crunching noises)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shh, go to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just repeatedly slamming his head into the stone until his arms go limp. You slide his face across the stone as he collapses to the ground. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take my scarf, wipe the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're doing that, the guy behind him, who was his backup, sees this happen, because his initiative's next in the order, and he turns and runs. [laughter, cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes at a full run and then a dash, so he's about 60 feet away from you down the hallway getting near the front doors of the fortress.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to shout out  Hey Keg, we got a runner! I don't know if she heard me or not.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, now that we're entering combat, and everybody's there, it's time to roll initiative. Everyone, roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The hand slowly pulls the gag away from the mouth. Khary, if you'd like to join us at the table? [roaring applause]

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: The murmuring!

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I don't know about you people, but I'm tired of this stabbing feeling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The rest of you, what are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not hearing Caleb for a while, I'm going to, again, creep down the hallway and peek around a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, go ahead. Take your time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we do the thing? The Brady Bunch where all of our heads are stacked while we peek around the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Screw it, I'm going to come too. I'm sorry!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you do some magicky things, Mr. Clay? Something?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the three of your heads poke around the corner, all three of you shift as Keg slams into from behind. Both of their heads, who were currently bickering, of Protto and Ruzza look back towards the front. "Shit, they're here! Back up!" They both begin to retract and back up into the chamber behind them.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I shoot?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you'd like to.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would like to shoot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I also have a thing I'd like to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll shoot at-- it's Protto and Ruzza?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Caduceus?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think i'm going to-- Oh god-- We don't want all the magic in one place. That seems like a bad idea. I think I'll pull off and hug the wall to the left and get as far back from that corner as I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. (counting) At this moment, make a perception check, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, as you came down the bottom of the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 12. Plus nothing, Taliesin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look down and see the empty chamber. No movement. Beauregard, you were looking around the corner. Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god! Five. Right? That was a two, plus three. Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keg, you make a perception check as well, since you're both at the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Come on, baby. (singing) 20! [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thank the gods.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What are you?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keg, as you hit the wall and glance around the side, you can see a humanoid shape ducked into the shadows underneath the table in the center, who has pulled a heavy crossbow from underneath the leather and aiming it at Nott, which does attempt to shoot. That is a 17 to hit. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It hits!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It hits. For that, Nott, you take eight points of piercing damage as a bolt hits right towards the kneecap and actually sticks out the side, you almost falling to one edge.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will dodge uncannily.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. Reduce that to four. Caduceus, as you walked around the corner, you turn around to see and come face to face with Ruzza, who is back up against the corner, and looks towards you and goes, "What the fuck?!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do I have time to do a thing?
